title: Cyberpunk 2077 Guns for Vic's Point Blank
description: A content pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds guns from Cyberpunk 2077 into Minecraft!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UmoRHucWMZU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This is a content pack for Vic's Point Blank which adds various guns and other weapons from Cyberpunk 2077 for you to use against anything! (Even your own chooms!)

**DISCLAIMER: THIS CONTENT PACK REQUIRES VIC'S POINT BLANK 1.11.1 OR LATER! JEI or REI is also highly recommended for crafting recipes!**

Currently there are over 50 weapons in the pack, and I will add more as I continue to work on this pack.

**_HOW TO INSTALL:_**  
**1:** Download the content pack  
**2:** If you haven't already, create a folder in your ".minecraft" folder called "pointblank" (The .minecraft folder is located in a different spot depending on your Operating System and/or Minecraft launcher. The following directories are the default locations for the .minecraft folder depending on your OS:

*   **Windows:** C:\\users\\<YOURUSERNAME>\\AppData\\Roaming\\.minecraft
*   **Linux:** ~/.minecraft
*   **MacOS:** ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft

**3:** Drag & drop the content pack into the "pointblank" folder inside your ".minecraft" folder

And you're good to go! Have fun shooting your enemies (and potentially your chooms) with preem weaponry!

**_FAQ:_**  
_Does this pack work on <insert Minecraft version here>?_ - **If Vic's Point Blank works on your preferred version of Minecraft, the content packs you download should also work. Content packs are not version specific.**

_The game crashes with the error "Exception message: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Invalid feature type: Accuracy"_ - **Update Vic's Point Blank to the latest version.**

_How do I craft X?_ - **You should be getting item recipes when getting the materials for any of the craftable items. If you still can't figure it out, use Just Enough Items (JEI) or Roughly Enough Items (REI) to look up the recipes.**

**_CREDITS:_**  
\[Discord\] ZenZen (zenzen3647): Texture artwork for the M-179e Achilles prior to version 1.16  
\[CurseForge\] Mr\_Cheese: Chinese translations for some of the weapons  
vic4games & vic4gamesteam: VFX from base Vic's Point Blank  
CD Projekt RED: Gun SFX from Cyberpunk 2077
